'''King's Galquek''', sometimes referred to as '''Kay-Gee''' or '''K-G''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
The planet had a rich history involving royalty. During the [[New Sith Wars]], King's Galquek became a battlefield in [[1500 BBY]] at the [[Sith incursion at King's Galquek|Battle of King's Galquek]], shortly before the [[Battle of Mizra]].

At some point after the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] supported a coup on King's Galquek.<ref name="TNEGtWaT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
